---
title: "Activities"
---

## **Competitions**

- American Statistical Association \| DataFest at Cal Poly (2025) \| 48-hour data analysis marathon (Winner).

- Association for Practical & Professional Ethics \| Intercollegiate Ethics Bowl (2024).

- American Statistical Association \| DataFest at Cal Poly (2024) \| 48-hour data analysis marathon (Winner).

## **Committees**

#### **Previous Appointments:**

- ASI Cal Maritime Integration Ad Hoc Committee (Chair) (2025-2026)

- Associated Students Inc. Board of Directors (2023-2026)

- Distinguished Teaching Award Committee (2024-2026)

- Substance Use and Misuse Advisory Committee (2024-2026)

- Artificial Intelligence Student Success Advisory Group (2025-2026)

- Academic Senate: Student Perceptions of Teaching Effectiveness Ad Hoc Committee (2025-2026)

- Internal Review Committee (Chair) (2023-2025)

- Campus Administrative Policy Committee (2023-2025)

- Student Health Services Advisory Committee of the California State University (2023-2025)

- Bailey College of Science & Math Inclusion and Equity Committee (2024-2025)

- Bailey College of Science & Math Inclusion and Equity Funding Review Committee (2024-2025)

- Academic Senate (2024-2025)

- Academic Senate Executive Committee (2024-2025)

- Ad-Hoc Bylaw Review Committee (Chair) (2024)

- Student Success Fee Allocation Committee (2023-2024)

## **Awards**

- Michael Koehn Scholarship - Finalist, Cal Poly University Housing (2026)

- Best use of External Data at ASA DataFest, Cal Poly (2025)

- Kathy Storelli "Use Your Voice" Scholarship, ASI Student Government (2024)

- Best Visualization at ASA DataFest, Cal Poly (2024)

- Joyce Curry-Daly and James Daly Scholarship, Cal Poly Statistics Department (2023)

- Outstanding Character and Communication Scholarship, North County Education Fund (2022)

- Employee of the Year, Food Service (2022)
